ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Sweet pepper, green, yellow or red, raw
Sweet pepper, green, yellow or red, raw

ingredients_text: RSPCA Approved Chicken Breast (90%), Thai Glaze (10%) (Water, Salt, Dehydrated Vegetables (Capsicum, Onion, Garlic), Maize Flour, Vegetable Powder (Garlic), Maize Starch, Spices (Coriander, Galangal, Turmeric, Tamarind, Mace), Herbs (Coriander, Lemongrass, Basil, Kaffir Lime), Yeast Extract, Anti-Caking Agent (Calcium Phosphates), Sugar, Natural Flavouring (Coconut), Spice Extract (Capsicum), Herb Extract (Lemongrass)).
